name: ducket-ai-galactica
description: Autonomous fraud detection agent with USDT escrow enforcement

scripts.demo: concurrently --names openclaw,agent,dashboard --prefix-colors cyan,blue,green "npx openclaw gateway run --dev --allow-unconfigured" "npx tsx agent/src/scan-loop.js" "npm run dev --workspace=dashboard"
scripts.demo:fallback: concurrently --names agent,dashboard --prefix-colors blue,green "npx tsx agent/src/scan-loop.js" "npm run dev --workspace=dashboard"
